# Jaize Tech

> AI demos don't ship. I fix that. Two and a half years running AI in industrial production. Sole engineer on a computer-vision platform serving inference 24/7 for Dutch agritech. Now taking on AI engineering and production-hardening work via Jaize Tech (KvK 42051769). Based in IJlst, Friesland, Netherlands. Available part-time now, full-time with a one month notice period.

Jaize Tech is the consultancy of Abdellah Jaize, a Moroccan software engineer based in the Netherlands. Currently sole engineer on a production AI computer-vision platform for Dutch agritech, after building mobile and web product at an early-stage sportstech startup. The pitch is engineering, not models: I take AI features from POC to working production, end-to-end.

## How I work

- [Engagements overview](https://jaizetech.nl/en/services): Three time-boxed engagements. Pick the one that fits where you are.
- [POC Audit](https://jaizetech.nl/en/services#audit): One-week sprint. You have a working AI demo. I tell you exactly what breaks at scale, what to fix first, and a 90-day plan to ship. Written report and 60-minute readout.
- [Production Hardening](https://jaizetech.nl/en/services#hardening): Three to six weeks. Your AI feature works in dev but breaks under real users, costs too much, or hallucinates wrong. I add evals, monitoring, prompt versioning, latency and cost controls, and harden the deploy.
- [Full Build](https://jaizetech.nl/en/services#build): Six to twelve weeks. The AI feature plus the product around it, end-to-end. Backend, frontend, model integration, infra, deploy. Senior engineer who owns the whole thing.

## Work

- [AI computer-vision platform for Dutch agritech](https://jaizetech.nl/en/work#agritech): Sole engineer on AI quality control system. ResNet, YOLO on NVIDIA Triton, NestJS API, Vue.js annotation interface, hybrid on-prem and cloud. In production since Q3 2023.
- [Sportstech startup mobile and web product](https://jaizetech.nl/en/work#appistadium): React Native app with Unity game features, plus React and Next.js back-office and public website. NestJS backend, AWS, OAuth2 with RBAC. Released on App Store and Google Play.

## Blog

- [How to hire an AI engineer in the Netherlands](https://jaizetech.nl/en/blog/hire-ai-engineer-netherlands): Three options to get senior AI engineering into a Dutch scale-up. Real cost of each, when each fits, red flags to avoid.
- [Build vs buy AI features: math for your CTO](https://jaizetech.nl/en/blog/build-vs-buy-ai-features): A four-quadrant model for deciding whether to build, buy, or wrap AI features.
- [EU AI Act checklist for Dutch software teams](https://jaizetech.nl/en/blog/eu-ai-act-checklist-dutch-software-teams): Practical engineering steps for limited-risk and high-risk AI systems under the EU AI Act.
- [RAG vs fine-tuning: a 20-minute decision](https://jaizetech.nl/en/blog/rag-vs-fine-tuning-decision-flowchart): Five-question flowchart, three cases where fine-tuning is the wrong answer, two where RAG alone is not enough.
- [CrewAI to LangGraph: a migration playbook](https://jaizetech.nl/en/blog/crewai-to-langgraph-migration-playbook): Production-grade migration steps for moving an agent prototype to a graph runtime.

## About

- [About Abdellah](https://jaizetech.nl/en/about): Bio, work history, education, languages, current availability.
- [Contact](https://jaizetech.nl/en/contact): Send a message or book a 15-minute call.

## Stack

- Backend: NestJS, Node.js, TypeScript, Python, FastAPI, REST, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Redis, OAuth2, JWT, RBAC.
- Frontend and mobile: React, Next.js, Vue, Nuxt 3, React Native, Tailwind, Radix UI.
- Cloud and DevOps: AWS, GCP, Cloudflare, GitLab CI/CD, GitHub Actions, Docker, Nginx, Linux.
- AI and ML: LangGraph, LangChain, RAG, OpenAI, Anthropic, NVIDIA Triton, ResNet, YOLO, OCR, vector DBs (Pinecone, Weaviate, pgvector).

## Profile

- Name: Abdellah Jaize
- Role: AI Software Engineer
- Based: IJlst, Friesland, Netherlands
- Languages: English (full professional), French (professional working), Arabic (native)
- Business: Jaize Tech (KvK 42051769)
- Education: M.Sc. Big Data and Internet of Things, ENSAM Casablanca (2019 to 2021)
- Availability: Part-time freelance now, outside business hours. Full-time engagements with a one month notice period.
- Contact: abdellah@jaizetech.nl
